svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.6.1 Chrome/142.0.7444.265 Electron/39.8.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.1" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="mocka-architecture" name="MoCKA Overview"> <mxGraphModel dx="1808" dy="1185" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1400" pageHeight="900" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="panel-what-why" parent="1" style="rounded=1;html=1;fillColor=#111827;strokeColor=#4b5563;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="260" width="420" x="40" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="label-what" parent="panel-what-why" style="text;html=1;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#e5e7eb;align=left;verticalAlign=top;" value="What is MoCKA" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="260" x="20" y="15" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="what-line1" parent="panel-what-why" style="text;html=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#9ca3af;align=left;verticalAlign=top;" value="• Deterministic, verifiable architecture" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="380" x="20" y="42" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="what-line2" parent="panel-what-why" style="text;html=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#9ca3af;align=left;verticalAlign=top;" value="• Models a knowledge-generating civilization" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="380" x="20" y="62" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="what-line3" parent="panel-what-why" style="text;html=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#9ca3af;align=left;verticalAlign=top;" value="• Converts all processes into:" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="380" x="20" y="82" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="what-sub1" parent="panel-what-why" style="text;html=1;fontSize=11;fontColor=#d1d5db;align=left;verticalAlign=top;" value="– Structured records" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="16" width="360" x="35" y="102" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="what-sub2" parent="panel-what-why" style="text;html=1;fontSize=11;fontColor=#d1d5db;align=left;verticalAlign=top;" value="– Append-only logs" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="16" width="360" x="35" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="what-sub3" parent="panel-what-why" style="text;html=1;fontSize=11;fontColor=#d1d5db;align=left;verticalAlign=top;" value="– Auditable decisions" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="16" width="360" x="35" y="138" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="what-sub4" parent="panel-what-why" style="text;html=1;fontSize=11;fontColor=#d1d5db;align=left;verticalAlign=top;" value="– Reproducible outcomes" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="16" width="360" x="35" y="156" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="label-why" parent="panel-what-why" style="text;html=1;fontSize=15;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#e5e7eb;align=left;verticalAlign=top;" value="Why it matters" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="260" x="20" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="why-line1" parent="panel-what-why" style="text;html=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#9ca3af;align=left;verticalAlign=top;" value="• Every action is recorded, verified, audited, learned from" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="380" x="20" y="214" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="why-line2" parent="panel-what-why" style="text;html=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#9ca3af;align=left;verticalAlign=top;" value="• Failure is prevented before it occurs" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="380" x="20" y="234" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="title-main" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=20;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#ffffff;align=left;verticalAlign=top;" value="MoCKA Runtime — Model of Cybernetic Knowledge Architecture" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="900" x="40" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="subtitle-main" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#a0aec0;align=left;verticalAlign=top;" value="<font style="font-size: 22px;">From AI System → Civilization Architecture</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="500" x="40" y="75" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="label-loop-desc" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#9ca3af;align=left;verticalAlign=top;" value="Observation → Record → Incident → Recurrence → Prevention → Decision → Action → Audit → Learning" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="850" x="490" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="loop-observation" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#1f2937;strokeColor=#4ade80;fontColor=#e5e7eb;" value="Observation" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="120" x="500" y="135" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="loop-record" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#111827;strokeColor=#60a5fa;fontColor=#e5e7eb;" value="Record" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="120" x="640" y="135" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="loop-incident" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#111827;strokeColor=#f97316;fontColor=#e5e7eb;" value="Incident" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="120" x="780" y="135" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="loop-recurrence" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#111827;strokeColor=#f97316;fontColor=#e5e7eb;" value="Recurrence" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="120" x="920" y="135" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="loop-prevention" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#111827;strokeColor=#22c55e;fontColor=#e5e7eb;" value="Prevention" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="120" x="920" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="loop-decision" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#111827;strokeColor=#a855f7;fontColor=#e5e7eb;" value="Decision" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="120" x="920" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="loop-action" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#111827;strokeColor=#a855f7;fontColor=#e5e7eb;" value="Action" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="120" x="780" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="loop-audit" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#111827;strokeColor=#eab308;fontColor=#e5e7eb;" value="Audit" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="260" x="500" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="loop-learning" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#111827;strokeColor=#22c55e;fontColor=#e5e7eb;" value="Learning" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="120" x="500" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-observe-record" edge="1" parent="1" source="loop-observation" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeColor=#6b7280;" target="loop-record"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-record-incident" edge="1" parent="1" source="loop-record" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeColor=#6b7280;" target="loop-incident"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-incident-recurrence" edge="1" parent="1" source="loop-incident" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeColor=#6b7280;" target="loop-recurrence"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-recurrence-prevention" edge="1" parent="1" source="loop-recurrence" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeColor=#6b7280;" target="loop-prevention"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-prevention-decision" edge="1" edge="1" parent="1" source="loop-learning" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeColor=#6b7280;curved=1;" target="loop-observation"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="560" y="220" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="560" y="260" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="panel-runtime" parent="1" style="rounded=1;html=1;fillColor=#111827;strokeColor=#4b5563;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="190" width="270" x="1100" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="label-runtime" parent="panel-runtime" style="text;html=1;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#e5e7eb;align=left;verticalAlign=top;" value="Runtime & Verification" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="195" x="15" y="15" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="label-quickstart" parent="panel-runtime" style="text;html=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#9ca3af;align=left;verticalAlign=top;" value="Quick Start" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="150" x="15" y="42" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="code-mainloop" parent="panel-runtime" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#020617;strokeColor=#1f2937;fontColor=#e5e7eb;fontSize=11;fontFamily=Consolas;" value="python -m runtime.main_loop" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="26" width="150" x="15" y="69" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="label-verification" parent="panel-runtime" style="text;html=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#9ca3af;align=left;verticalAlign=top;" value="Verification" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="150" x="15" y="95" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="code-verify" parent="panel-runtime" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#020617;strokeColor=#1f2937;fontColor=#e5e7eb;fontSize=11;fontFamily=Consolas;" value="python verify_chain.py" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="26" width="150" x="15" y="113" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="code-rebuild" parent="panel-runtime" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#020617;strokeColor=#1f2937;fontColor=#e5e7eb;fontSize=11;fontFamily=Consolas;" value="python rebuild_state.py" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="26" width="142.5" x="15" y="143" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="panel-governance" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#111827;strokeColor=#4b5563;fontColor=#e5e7eb;align=left;verticalAlign=top;" value="Governance Layer
Defines how decisions are made and controlled" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="610" x="490" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gov-item1" parent="panel-governance" style="text;html=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#d1d5db;align=left;verticalAlign=top;" value="• execution_order_engine" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="185.97560975609755" x="14.878048780487806" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gov-item2" parent="panel-governance" style="text;html=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#d1d5db;align=left;verticalAlign=top;" value="• dispatcher" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="148.78048780487805" x="208.29268292682926" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gov-item3" parent="panel-governance" style="text;html=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#d1d5db;align=left;verticalAlign=top;" value="• meta_audit_engine" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="185.97560975609755" x="14.878048780487806" y="75" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gov-item4" parent="panel-governance" style="text;html=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#d1d5db;align=left;verticalAlign=top;" value="• preventive_rule_engine" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="185.97560975609755" x="208.29268292682926" y="75" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="panel-record" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#020617;strokeColor=#4b5563;fontColor=#e5e7eb;align=left;verticalAlign=top;" value="Record Layer
Ensures all events are structured and reusable" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="610" x="490" y="460" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rec-item1" parent="panel-record" style="text;html=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#d1d5db;align=left;verticalAlign=top;" value="• csv_record_engine" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="185.97560975609755" x="14.878048780487806" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rec-item2" parent="panel-record" style="text;html=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#d1d5db;align=left;verticalAlign=top;" value="• recurrence_engine" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="185.97560975609755" x="208.29268292682926" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rec-item3" parent="panel-record" style="text;html=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#d1d5db;align=left;verticalAlign=top;" value="• improvement_loop" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="185.97560975609755" x="14.878048780487806" y="75" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="panel-core" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#0f172a;strokeColor=#4b5563;fontColor=#e5e7eb;align=left;verticalAlign=top;" value="Core Runtime
Drives the entire civilization loop" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="610" x="490" y="600" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="core-item1" parent="panel-core" style="text;html=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#d1d5db;align=left;verticalAlign=top;" value="• main_loop" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="148.78048780487805" x="14.878048780487806" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-gov-rec" edge="1" parent="1" source="panel-governance" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeColor=#60a5fa;" target="panel-record"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-rec-core" edge="1" parent="1" source="panel-record" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeColor=#60a5fa;" target="panel-core"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="panel-concept" parent="1" style="rounded=1;html=1;fillColor=#020617;strokeColor=#4b5563;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="260" width="420" x="40" y="430" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="concept-label" parent="panel-concept" style="text;html=1;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#e5e7eb;align=left;verticalAlign=top;" value="Concept" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="200" x="20" y="15" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="concept-line1" parent="panel-concept" style="text;html=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#9ca3af;align=left;verticalAlign=top;" value="MoCKA does not aim to generate answers." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="380" x="20" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="concept-line2" parent="panel-concept" style="text;html=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#9ca3af;align=left;verticalAlign=top;" value="It builds a structure where knowledge becomes trustworthy over time." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="32" width="380" x="20" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="concept-line3" parent="panel-concept" style="text;html=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#e5e7eb;align=left;verticalAlign=top;" value="This is not just an AI system. It is a civilization model." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="32" width="380" x="20" y="88" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="jp-label" parent="panel-concept" style="text;html=1;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#e5e7eb;align=left;verticalAlign=top;" value="日本語サマリ" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="200" x="20" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="jp-line1" parent="panel-concept" style="text;html=1;fontSize=11;fontColor=#9ca3af;align=left;verticalAlign=top;" value="• MoCKAは「動くAI」ではなく、「知識文明の構造」を再現するアーキテクチャ。" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="380" x="20" y="155" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="jp-line2" parent="panel-concept" style="text;html=1;fontSize=11;fontColor=#9ca3af;align=left;verticalAlign=top;" value="• すべてを構造化記録・追記ログ・監査可能な判断・再現可能な結果へ変換する。" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="380" x="20" y="178" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="jp-line3" parent="panel-concept" style="text;html=1;fontSize=11;fontColor=#9ca3af;align=left;verticalAlign=top;" value="• 失敗は抑止され、判断は追跡可能となり、改善は蓄積され続ける。" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="380" x="20" y="201" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="jp-line4" parent="panel-concept" style="text;html=1;fontSize=11;fontColor=#9ca3af;align=left;verticalAlign=top;" value="• これは「生きている制度」としてのMoCKAの姿を示す。" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="380" x="20" y="224" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="version-label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=11;fontColor=#6b7280;align=left;verticalAlign=top;" value="<font style="font-size: 15px;">MoCKA Civilization Architecture — v1.0.0</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="400" x="50" y="700" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s1LcbQuw7fLTObdLSRCM-3" edge="1" parent="1" source="loop-audit" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.25;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.541;entryY=1.053;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;entryPerimeter=0;" target="loop-learning"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s1LcbQuw7fLTObdLSRCM-4" edge="1" parent="1" source="loop-audit" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.229;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;entryPerimeter=0;" target="panel-governance"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="why-line3" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#9ca3af;align=left;verticalAlign=top;" value="<b><font style="font-size: 15px;">• Decisions are accountable, improvements cumulative</font></b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="380" x="50" y="390" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s1LcbQuw7fLTObdLSRCM-6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;autosizeText=0;fontSize=23;fontStyle=0;labelBackgroundColor=none;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=4;glass=0;shadow=0;" value="MoCKA Civilization Loop" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="260" x="640" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
